en.question: A square is divided into four equal smaller squares. In the first figure, top-left is shaded. Second: top-right. Third: bottom-right. Which square shaded in the fourth?
en.explanation: The shaded square moves clockwise: top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left.

hi.question: एक वर्ग चार बराबर छोटे वर्गों में बँटा है। पहले में ऊपर-बाएँ, दूसरे में ऊपर-दाएँ, तीसरे में नीचे-दाएँ छायांकित। चौथे में?
hi.explanation: छायांकित वर्ग दक्षिणावर्त घूमता है: ऊपर-बाएँ, ऊपर-दाएँ, नीचे-दाएँ, नीचे-बाएँ।

en.question: Mirror image of RAIL reads as LIAR. What would mirror image of PORT read as?
en.explanation: In a mirror, word is reversed left-to-right. PORT reversed = TROP.

hi.question: RAIL का दर्पण प्रतिबिंब LIAR पढ़ा जाता है। PORT का दर्पण प्रतिबिंब?
hi.explanation: दर्पण में शब्द बाएँ-से-दाएँ उलट जाता है। PORT उलटा = TROP।

en.question: Figure 1 has 1 dot (triangle), Fig 2 has 3 dots, Fig 3 has 6 dots. How many dots in Fig 5?
en.explanation: Triangular numbers: T_n=n(n+1)/2. T_5=5×6/2=15.

en.question: How many squares are there on a standard chessboard (8×8)?

hi.question: मानक शतरंज बोर्ड (8×8) में कुल कितने वर्ग हैं?

en.question: A cube painted on all faces, cut into 125 smaller cubes. How many have exactly two faces painted?
en.explanation: 125=5³. 12 edges, each: 5-2=3 cubes. Total=12×3=36.

hi.question: सभी फलकों पर रंगा घन, 125 छोटे घनों में काटा। ठीक दो फलक रंगे कितने?
hi.explanation: 12 कोर, प्रत्येक पर 3, कुल=36।

en.question: Water image of RAILWAY appears as...?
en.explanation: Water image (reflection) inverts the image vertically (top becomes bottom).

hi.question: RAILWAY का जल प्रतिबिंब कैसा दिखता है?
hi.explanation: जल प्रतिबिंब में छवि ऊर्ध्वाधर उल्टी हो जाती है।

en.question: Which cannot be a net of a cube? (D) Line of 6 squares.
en.explanation: A line of 6 squares cannot fold into a cube (faces overlap).

hi.question: घन का जाल कौन-सा नहीं हो सकता?
hi.explanation: 6 वर्गों की एक पंक्ति से घन नहीं बन सकता।

en.question: How many triangles in a pentagon drawn with all its diagonals?
en.explanation: A regular pentagon with all diagonals has 35 distinct triangles.

hi.question: सभी विकर्णों सहित पंचभुज में कितने त्रिभुज?
hi.explanation: पूर्णतः खींचे पंचभुज में 35 त्रिभुज।

en.question: Paper folded once, circle cut away from fold. How many holes when unfolded?
en.explanation: One cut through 2 layers = 2 holes when unfolded.

hi.question: कागज एक बार मोड़ा, मोड़ से दूर वृत्त काटा। खोलने पर कितने छेद?
hi.explanation: दो परतों से एक कटाव = 2 छेद।

en.question: Cube faces: 1 opposite 6, 2 opposite 5, 3 opposite 4. 1 at bottom, 2 at front. Number on top?
en.explanation: 1 opposite 6, so 6 is on top.

hi.question: घन: 1↔6, 2↔5, 3↔4। 1 नीचे, 2 सामने। ऊपर कौन-सा अंक?
hi.explanation: 1 के विपरीत 6, इसलिए ऊपर 6।

en.question: Mirror to right of MIRROR123. Mirror image?
en.explanation: Mirror on right reflects left-to-right: 321RORRIM.

hi.question: MIRROR123 के दाएँ दर्पण। प्रतिबिंब?
hi.explanation: दर्पण बाएँ-दाएँ उलटता है: 321RORRIM।

en.question: Fig 1: 4 matchsticks (1 square), Fig 2: 7 (2 squares), Fig 3: 10 (3 squares). Fig 10?
Paper folded twice, cut on folded edge corner. How many holes?
en.explanation: Folding twice = 4 layers. Cut on corner = 4 holes (one per quadrant).

hi.question: कागज दो बार मोड़कर कोने पर काटा। कितने छेद?
hi.explanation: दो बार मोड़ने पर 4 परतें, कोने पर काटने से 4 छेद।

en.question: Embedded figure: Find the number of triangles in the given figure (a square divided by its two diagonals).
en.explanation: Two diagonals of a square create 8 triangles: 4 small + 4 medium (combining small ones).

hi.question: दिए गए चित्र (विकर्णों वाला वर्ग) में त्रिभुजों की संख्या बताएँ।
hi.explanation: दो विकर्ण 8 त्रिभुज बनाते हैं: 4 छोटे + 4 मध्यम।

en.question: A cube has 6 faces. What is the shape of each face?
en.explanation: All faces of a cube are squares of equal size.

hi.question: एक घन के 6 फलक होते हैं। प्रत्येक फलक का आकार क्या है?
hi.explanation: घन के सभी फलक समान आकार के वर्ग होते हैं।

en.question: Complete the pattern: ▲, ■, ●, ▲, ■, __?
en.explanation: Pattern repeats every 3: triangle, square, circle. After square comes circle.

hi.question: पैटर्न पूरा करें: ▲, ■, ●, ▲, ■, __?
hi.explanation: पैटर्न 3 में दोहराता: त्रिभुज, वर्ग, वृत्त। वर्ग के बाद वृत्त।

en.question: A 4×4×4 cube is painted on all faces and cut into 1×1×1 cubes. How many small cubes have no face painted?
en.explanation: Inner cubes = (n-2)³ = 2³ = 8.

hi.question: 4×4×4 घन को सभी फलकों पर रंगकर 1×1×1 के घनों में काटा। कितने छोटे घनों का कोई फलक रंगा नहीं?

en.question: Which figure completes the matrix? Row1: ○△□, Row2: △□○, Row3: □__△
en.explanation: Each symbol appears once per row/column. Missing is ○.

hi.question: कौन-सी आकृति मैट्रिक्स पूरा करती है? पंक्ति1: ○△□, पंक्ति2: △□○, पंक्ति3: □__△
hi.explanation: प्रत्येक प्रतीक पंक्ति/स्तंभ में एक बार। लुप्त ○।

en.question: Mirror image of number 7 placed to the left of mirror?
en.explanation: Mirror on left reverses left-right: 7 becomes backward 7 (like ᒋ).

hi.question: दर्पण के बाएँ रखे अंक 7 का प्रतिबिंब?
hi.explanation: बाएँ दर्पण: 7 उल्टा दिखता है।

en.question: A cube with letters A,B,C,D,E,F on faces. A is opposite D, B opposite E, C opposite F. If A at top and B at front, what letter is at bottom?
en.explanation: A opposite D, so bottom = D.

hi.question: घन पर A,B,C,D,E,F। A↔D, B↔E, C↔F। A ऊपर, B सामने। नीचे कौन-सा अक्षर?
hi.explanation: A के विपरीत D, नीचे = D।

en.question: How many rectangles in a 3×2 grid?

hi.question: 3×2 ग्रिड में कितने आयत?

en.question: Paper folding: Square paper folded along one diagonal. A small triangle cut from folded edge. When unfolded, how many cut shapes?
en.explanation: One fold = 2 layers, one cut through both layers = 2 symmetrical shapes when unfolded.

hi.question: कागज मोड़ना: वर्गाकार कागज एक विकर्ण पर मोड़ा। मुड़े किनारे से छोटा त्रिभुज काटा। खोलने पर कितनी कटी आकृतियाँ?
hi.explanation: एक मोड़ = 2 परतें, 2 सममित आकृतियाँ।

en.question: Figure series: ○→◎→●→◎→__?
en.explanation: Pattern: empty, half, full, half, empty. Next is ○.

hi.question: आकृति श्रृंखला: ○→◎→●→◎→__?
hi.explanation: खाली, आधा, पूरा, आधा, खाली। अगला ○।

en.question: Which cannot be formed by folding a cube net? Cross-shaped net showing 1 opposite 3.
en.explanation: In a standard cross net, 1 can be opposite 3. But 1 opposite 6 is not possible in this configuration.

hi.question: क्रॉस-आकार के घन जाल से कौन-सा नहीं बन सकता?
hi.explanation: क्रॉस जाल में 1,6 विपरीत नहीं हो सकते।

en.question: Counting: How many straight lines in a 3×3 grid of dots (4×4 dots)?
en.explanation: Rows=4, cols=4, diagonals=multiple. Rows: 4 horizontal, 4 vertical, 2 main diagonals = 10. Plus smaller diagonals. Total = 20.

hi.question: 4×4 बिंदुओं के ग्रिड में कितनी सीधी रेखाएँ?
hi.explanation: 4 क्षैतिज + 4 ऊर्ध्व + कई विकर्ण, कुल=20।

en.question: Shape analogy: Circle to Sphere as Square to ___?
en.explanation: Circle is 2D, Sphere is its 3D form. Square → Cube.

hi.question: आकृति सादृश्य: वृत्त : गोला :: वर्ग : ___?
hi.explanation: वृत्त (2D)→गोला (3D), वर्ग→घन।

en.question: A dice has numbers 1-6. View 1 shows 1,2,3. View 2 shows 3,5,6. What number is opposite 3?
en.explanation: 3 is adjacent to 1,2,5,6. So 4 must be opposite 3.

en.question: Water image of 'PQRST' (mirror placed below) will look like?
en.explanation: Water image below inverts the text vertically (top becomes bottom). Letters appear upside down.

hi.question: 'PQRST' का जल प्रतिबिंब (नीचे दर्पण) कैसा होगा?
hi.explanation: नीचे जल प्रतिबिंब ऊर्ध्वाधर उल्टा करता है।

en.question: Shape series: □ → ◇ → ○ → □ → __?
en.explanation: Pattern: square, diamond, circle, square, diamond, circle... Next: ◇.

hi.question: आकृति श्रृंखला: □ → ◇ → ○ → □ → __?
hi.explanation: वर्ग, समचतुर्भुज, वृत्त, वर्ग, समचतुर्भुज... अगला ◇।

en.question: A 3×3 cube is painted and cut. How many 1×1 cubes have exactly 1 face painted?
en.explanation: 1 face painted = center of each face. 6 faces, each with (3-2)²=1 cube. Total=6.

hi.question: 3×3 घन रंगकर काटा। ठीक 1 फलक रंगे घन?
hi.explanation: प्रति फलक (3-2)²=1, 6 फलक = 6।

en.question: How many triangles in a regular hexagon with all vertices connected to center?
en.explanation: 6 triangles from center to vertices + 6 more from combinations = 12.

hi.question: केंद्र से सभी शीर्ष जुड़े षट्भुज में त्रिभुज?
hi.explanation: केंद्र से 6 + अन्य संयोजन से 6 = 12।

en.question: Find the odd figure: (A) Circle, (B) Square, (C) Triangle, (D) Rectangle (all others have equal sides)
en.explanation: Circle is curved, others are polygons. Rectangle does not have all equal sides.

hi.question: बेमेल आकृति: (A) वृत्त, (B) वर्ग, (C) त्रिभुज, (D) आयत
hi.explanation: वृत्त वक्र है, बाकी बहुभुज।

en.question: Mirror placed to the left of 'ABCDEF'. Mirror image reads?
options: F E D C B A
en.explanation: Left mirror: complete left-right reversal = FEDCBA.

hi.question: 'ABCDEF' के बाएँ दर्पण। प्रतिबिंब?
options: F E D C B A
hi.explanation: बायाँ दर्पण: पूर्ण उलट = FEDCBA।

en.question: A dice: adjacent faces add to 7. If top=2 and front=3, what is on the right face?
en.explanation: Opposite pairs: (1,6),(2,5),(3,4). Top=2→bottom=5. Front=3→back=4. Right=1 (or 6). Since adjacent add to 7, right=1.

hi.question: पासा: आसन्न फलकों का योग 7। ऊपर=2, सामने=3। दायाँ फलक?

en.question: Pattern completion: A 4×4 grid with alternating black and white squares. If top-left is black, what is at (3,3)?
en.explanation: (3,3): row+col=6 (even). With top-left black (odd+odd), odd+odd=black, even+even=black. So (3,3) is black.

hi.question: 4×4 ग्रिड बारी-बारी काला-सफेद। ऊपर-बाएँ काला। (3,3) पर?

en.question: Cube with dots: One view shows 1,3,5. Another shows 2,4,6. Which pair is opposite?
en.explanation: 1,3,5 are on three mutually adjacent faces. 2,4,6 shown in other view. Since all 6 appear, and views show mutually adjacent faces, opposite pairs are (1,2),(3,4),(5,6). But 2,4,6 are mutually adjacent too. Actually, opposite must be from different views: 1-2, 3-4, 5-6.

en.question: Which shape has exactly 3 lines of symmetry?
en.explanation: An equilateral triangle has exactly 3 lines of symmetry (one through each vertex).

hi.question: किस आकृति में ठीक 3 सममिति रेखाएँ हैं?
hi.explanation: समबाहु त्रिभुज में 3 सममिति रेखाएँ।

en.question: Figure analogy: △:▲::○:__?
en.explanation: Empty triangle becomes filled triangle. Empty circle becomes filled circle.

hi.question: आकृति सादृश्य: △:▲::○:__?
hi.explanation: खाली त्रिभुज→भरा त्रिभुज। खाली वृत्त→भरा वृत्त।

en.question: A solid cube of side 6cm is painted and cut into 2cm cubes. How many small cubes have exactly 2 faces painted?
en.explanation: 6/2=3 → 3×3×3 = 27 small cubes. 2 faces painted = 12 edges × (3-2)=12 cubes.

hi.question: 6cm भुजा का घन रंगकर 2cm के घनों में काटा। ठीक 2 फलक रंगे?

en.question: Which figure is the correct mirror image of 'B2K4' when mirror is on the right?
en.explanation: Right mirror reverses order and mirrors each character: '4K2B' with each char mirrored.

hi.question: 'B2K4' का दायाँ दर्पण प्रतिबिंब?
hi.explanation: दायाँ दर्पण: उल्टा क्रम + प्रत्येक वर्ण दर्पित।

en.question: How many faces does a cube have?
en.explanation: A cube has 6 square faces, 12 edges, and 8 vertices.

hi.question: घन के कितने फलक होते हैं?
hi.explanation: घन में 6 वर्गाकार फलक, 12 कोर, 8 शीर्ष।

en.question: Figure matrix: Row1: 1 dot, 2 dots, 3 dots. Row2: 2 dots, 4 dots, 6 dots. Row3: 3 dots, 6 dots, __?
en.explanation: Each cell = row × column. Row3 Col3 = 3×3 = 9 dots.

hi.question: आकृति मैट्रिक्स: पंक्ति1: 1,2,3 बिंदु। पंक्ति2: 2,4,6। पंक्ति3: 3,6,__?
hi.explanation: प्रत्येक कोशिका = पंक्ति×स्तंभ। 3×3=9।

en.question: A cube of side 4cm is painted red and cut into 1cm cubes. How many cubes have 3 faces painted?
en.explanation: 3 faces painted = corner cubes. Cube has 8 corners, all having 3 faces painted.

hi.question: 4cm भुजा का घन लाल रंगकर 1cm घनों में काटा। 3 फलक रंगे?
hi.explanation: 3 फलक रंगे = कोने के घन = 8।

en.question: Which figure rotates to form a cone?
en.explanation: A right triangle rotated around one of its legs forms a cone.

hi.question: किस आकृति को घुमाने पर शंकु बनता है?
hi.explanation: समकोण त्रिभुज को एक भुजा पर घुमाने से शंकु।

en.question: Counting figures: How many squares in a 2×2 grid?
en.explanation: 4 small (1×1) + 1 large (2×2) = 5 squares.

hi.question: 2×2 ग्रिड में कितने वर्ग?

en.question: Paper cutting: A square is folded along one diagonal, then folded again along the other diagonal. A cut is made at the corner. How many holes?
en.explanation: Two folds = 4 layers. Cut at corner touches all 4 layers = 4 holes.

hi.question: कागज काटना: वर्ग एक विकर्ण पर मोड़ा, फिर दूसरे पर। कोने पर काटा। कितने छेद?
hi.explanation: दो मोड़=4 परतें, कोने का काट=4 छेद।

en.question: Which net forms a cube? (A) 4 squares in a row + 1 on each side, (B) T-shape, (C) Cross (+) shape, (D) 6 squares in a row
en.explanation: The cross shape is a valid cube net. 6-in-a-row is invalid.

hi.question: कौन-सा जाल घन बनाता है? (A) चार वर्ग पंक्ति+दोनों ओर 1, (B) T-आकार, (C) क्रॉस (+), (D) 6 वर्ग पंक्ति
hi.explanation: क्रॉस आकार मान्य घन जाल है। 6 की पंक्ति अमान्य।

en.question: Analogous figures: Hand:Glove::Foot:__?
en.explanation: Hand wears glove. Foot wears sock/shoe.

hi.question: सदृश आकृतियाँ: हाथ:दस्ताना::पैर:__?
hi.explanation: हाथ में दस्ताना, पैर में मोजा/जूता।

en.question: Find the next in series: →, ↑, ←, ↓, __?
en.explanation: Arrows rotate 90° clockwise each step. After ↓ comes →.

hi.question: अगला: →, ↑, ←, ↓, __?
hi.explanation: 90° दक्षिणावर्त घूर्णन। ↓ के बाद →।

en.question: Which dice view is correct if opposite faces sum to 7? 3 is on top.
en.explanation: If opposite faces sum to 7 and top=3, bottom=7-3=4.

hi.question: विपरीत फलकों का योग 7। ऊपर 3। नीचे?

en.question: A clock image shows 3:00. Its water image (mirror below) will show?
en.explanation: Water image below: vertical inversion. 3:00 becomes 9:00 (hour hand points opposite).

hi.question: घड़ी 3:00 दिखाती है। जल प्रतिबिंब (नीचे दर्पण) में?

en.question: A 5×5×5 cube is painted and cut into unit cubes. How many have at least one face painted?
en.explanation: Total cubes=125. Unpainted=(5-2)³=27. Painted=125-27=98.

hi.question: 5×5×5 घन रंगकर एकक घनों में काटा। कम से कम एक फलक रंगे?

en.question: Which shape is NOT a quadrilateral?
en.explanation: Triangle has 3 sides, not 4. Quadrilaterals have 4 sides.

hi.question: कौन-सी आकृति चतुर्भुज नहीं है?
hi.explanation: त्रिभुज में 3 भुजाएँ, चतुर्भुज में 4।

en.question: Pattern: 1st figure has 1 line, 2nd has 3 lines (triangle), 3rd has 6 lines (hexagon). 4th figure lines?
en.explanation: Lines: 1,3,6,10... triangular numbers. T_4=10.

hi.question: पहली आकृति 1 रेखा, दूसरी 3, तीसरी 6। चौथी में?
hi.explanation: त्रिकोणीय संख्याएँ: T_4=10।

en.question: Dice: One position shows 1,2,4 (1 on top, 2 front, 4 right). Second position shows 3,5,6 (3 on top, 5 front). What is opposite 6?
en.explanation: In position 1: 1 top, 2 front, 4 right. Bottom=6 (opposite 1). In position 2: 3 top, so 4 must be opposite 3. Then 2 opposite 5 and 1 opposite 6. Opposite 6 is 1.

en.question: Mirror image of 'TIME 12:30' with mirror on left. What does it show?
en.explanation: Left mirror: text reversed left-to-right, time digits reversed individually.

hi.question: 'TIME 12:30' का बायाँ दर्पण प्रतिबिंब?
hi.explanation: उल्टा क्रम: EMIT 03:21।

en.question: How many corners (vertices) does a cube have?
en.explanation: A cube has 8 vertices (corners).

hi.question: घन के कितने कोने (शीर्ष) होते हैं?
hi.explanation: घन के 8 शीर्ष होते हैं।

en.question: Figure series: ☐, ☐✕, ☐✕☐, ☐✕☐✕, __?
en.explanation: Alternating square and cross: 1⇢SQ, 2⇢SQ+X, 3⇢SQ+X+SQ, 4⇢SQ+X+SQ+X, 5⇢SQ+X+SQ+X+SQ.

hi.question: श्रृंखला: ☐, ☐✕, ☐✕☐, ☐✕☐✕, __?
